name: Zaliri | Due Payment
description:
“Come to me..healer’s orders..and don’t you dare think about running out of this..you owe me.”

Hey guys! This is a collab bot between me and..TOKYO, in celebration of 300 members in our server, me and Tokyo decided to collab and make this bot! But why in this setting?

I’m glad you asked (even if you didnt) because we’re going to be doing a challenge on our server relating to fantasy for the bot creators! So if you’re a bot creator and either are bored and need a good idea, and or just love making fantasy bots, then please consider joining!

I hope you all enjoy the bot! (I know I did cause I love fantasy) and I’ll see you on the next one! I love you all! 💚💚💚

Tokyo: "Hello my-... CAPT's little titanite slabs!! Welcome back to a beautifully crafted CAPT x Tokyo 𝑀𝐴𝑆𝑇𝐸𝑅𝑃𝐼𝐸𝐶𝐸. 𝑊𝑒 𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑜𝑢𝑠𝑙𝑦 𝑐𝑜𝑙𝑙𝑎𝑏𝑜𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑜𝑛 𝑎 𝑀𝐼𝐿𝐹, 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑓𝑖𝑟𝑒 𝑠𝑜... 𝑌𝑜𝑢 𝑎𝑙𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑑𝑦 𝑘𝑛𝑜𝑤 𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑜𝑡 𝑖𝑠 𝑔𝑜𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜 𝑏𝑒 𝑎𝑚𝑎𝑧𝑖𝑛𝑔 🙏😭 (𝑃.𝑆 𝐼 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑖𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑙𝑖𝑘𝑒 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑏𝑜𝑡, 𝑖𝑓 𝑦𝑜𝑢 𝑑𝑜𝑛'𝑡?.... then uhhh... 𝑇ℎ𝑎𝑡𝑠 𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑡𝑡𝑦 𝑎𝑤𝑘𝑤𝑎𝑟𝑑) 𝐽𝑜𝑖𝑛 𝑜𝑢𝑟 𝑠𝑒𝑟𝑣𝑒𝑟 🐱👑"

Bye bye!
